front.title: BGP Signaling of MASQUE Tunnel Encapsulation

abstract.t: This document defines BGP Tunnel Encapsulation Attribute tunnel types for MASQUE CONNECT-TCP, CONNECT-UDP, CONNECT-IP, and CONNECT- ETHERNET. It also defines URI Template and ALPN Sub-TLVs for advertising the MASQUE proxy endpoint, the HTTP request target template, and the application-layer protocol constraints used to establish the corresponding MASQUE tunnel.
